name: Flip Bros
author: Poki
description: Flip Bros is a funny platform game where you take down your enemies by launching yourself at them! All you need to do is to jump, rotate, and shoot yourself at the right time. The key to success is to maintain your momentum and seize the perfect moment! Seems simple, right? Be careful with all kinds of obstacles that could hurt you or stop you. Let us flip together! How to play Flip Bros? To jump and rotate, hold the mouse or space bar; release it to shoot. Who created Flip Bros? Flip Bros is created by GameTornado. Play their other games on Poki: Short Life , Short Life 2 , Poor Eddie , Dreadhead Parkour , Eugene's Life and Mini Train ! How can I play Flip Bros for free? You can play Flip Bros for free on Poki. Can I play Flip Bros on mobile devices and desktop? Flip Bros can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
